text:
201. (1)Subject to the compliance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, a public issue
may be opened:
a) within twelve months from the date of issuance of the observations by the Board under
regulation 6; or
(2) an issue shall be opened after at least three working days from the date of registering the
prospectus with the Registrar of Companies.
Minimum subscription
section_title: 201. (1)Subject to the compliance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, a public issue
